result.stdout:
Description:
  Scaffold .NET solutions with strong foundations and optional Clean Architecture layout.
  
  Examples:
    solution-setup --solutionName BookingService
    solution-setup --solutionName BookingService --layout clean --framework net10.0 --presentation api

Usage:
  SolutionSetup.Cli [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information
  --solutionName (REQUIRED)  Name of the solution (also used as project prefix)
  --path                     Target directory where the solution folder will be created. Defaults to the current directory.
  --framework                Target framework for generated projects (net9.0 or net10.0). [default: net9.0]
  --layout                   Layout to scaffold (foundation or clean). [default: foundation]
  --testFramework            Test framework to use for test projects. [default: xunit]
  --skipGlobalJson           If set, global.json will not be created. [default: False]
  --presentation             Presentation style for clean layout (api or mvc). [default: api]
  --solutionFormat           Solution format to emit (sln or slnx). Defaults to sln. [default: sln]
  --dryRun                   Show what would be generated without writing files or running dotnet commands. [default: False]

Description:
  Scaffold .NET solutions with strong foundations and optional Clean Architecture layout.
  
  Examples:
    solution-setup --solutionName BookingService
    solution-setup --solutionName BookingService --layout clean --framework net10.0 --presentation api

Usage:
  SolutionSetup.Cli [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
  --version                  Show version information
  --solutionName (REQUIRED)  Name of the solution (also used as project prefix)
  --path                     Target directory where the solution folder will be created. Defaults to the current directory.
  --framework                Target framework for generated projects (net9.0 or net10.0). [default: net9.0]
  --layout                   Layout to scaffold (foundation or clean). [default: foundation]
  --testFramework            Test framework to use for test projects. [default: xunit]
  --skipGlobalJson           If set, global.json will not be created. [default: False]
  --presentation             Presentation style for clean layout (api or mvc). [default: api]
  --solutionFormat           Solution format to emit (sln or slnx). Defaults to sln. [default: sln]
  --dryRun                   Show what would be generated without writing files or running dotnet commands. [default: False]
